text.title: Stripe Payment Links No Backend Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion referencing a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the catalog satisfy preconditions (drivers present: billing_model, custom_amount_per_buyer, connect_required, catalog_size)?

conclusion.verdict: Catalog incomplete — return structured error, do not guess defaults.
Reject no-backend pattern; escalate to stripe-connect-backend methodology.

branch.when: drivers.valid == true AND connect_required == false AND billing_model == 'recurring'

conclusion.verdict: Use Checkout Session (Zapier Stripe action) — Payment Links cannot subscribe.

branch.when: drivers.valid == true AND connect_required == false AND billing_model == 'one-off' AND custom_amount_per_buyer == true

conclusion.verdict: Use Checkout Session for dynamic amounts.

branch.when: drivers.valid == true AND connect_required == false AND billing_model == 'one-off' AND custom_amount_per_buyer == false

conclusion.verdict: Pick Stripe Payment Link (hosted URL) — fixed price, no backend.
